name: momentarily-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker that fetches MTA feeds, runs the HMM forward filter, and publishes snapshot.json to R2

scripts.publish:schema: murk exec -- wrangler r2 object put momentarily/v1/snapshot.schema.json --file=../schema/snapshot.schema.json --content-type=application/json --cache-control="public, max-age=86400"
